stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Alicante (LEAL) chart 10-3C, SID MITOS 2A/1C from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
What procedure should you maintain when departing Runway 28?

options.a: Climb on runway heading to 2500 feet minimum height to D9.5 ALT, turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R126 inbound to D6.5 ALT, turn LEFT, intercept VSJ R036 to SUMMO, turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R068 to MITOS.
options.b: Climb on runway heading to 3100 feet minimum height to D9.5 ALT, turn LEFT, intercept ALT R246 inbound to D6.3 ALT, turn RIGHT, heading 091°, when passing ALT R143 turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R126 to D6.5 ALT, turn LEFT, intercept VSJ R036 to SUMMO, turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R068 to MITOS.
options.c: Climb on runway heading to 3500 feet minimum height to D10.0 ALT, turn LEFT, intercept ALT R246 inbound to D6.3 ALT, turn LEFT, heading 091°, when passing ALT R143 turn LEFT, intercept ALT R126 to D6.5 ALT, turn RIGHT, intercept VSJ R036 to SUMMO, turn LEFT, intercept ALT R068 to MITOS.
options.d: Climb on runway heading to 3100 feet minimum height to D8.5 ALT, turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R246 inbound to D6.3 ALT, turn LEFT, heading 091°, when passing ALT R143 turn RIGHT, intercept ALT R126 to D6.5 ALT, turn RIGHT, intercept VSJ R036 to SUMMO, turn LEFT, intercept ALT R068 to MITOS.
